variants.title: Donaldson P766495 Hydraulic Assembly
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P766495 Hydraulic Assembly is designed to provide reliable performance in hydraulic assembly applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
specifications: Style: Hydraulic Assembly, Outer Diameter: 171.0 mm, Length: 539.0 mm, Thread: 1 1/2 SAE 4 Bolt Code 61, Bypass Pressure: 0.3 BAR bar, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 0.3 BAR
